title: Scars In My Mind
lyrics: Scars are here in my mind Thinking of how you're gone Yeah, the scars are here in my mind I can't hold on Scars are here in my mind Thinking all the things Yeah, the scars are here in my mind Losing me every day I just think about how you ended all we built Scars are here in my mind We'll never get over this Lift me up with your guilt I don't care if you need anything again Lift me up with your guilt I don't care if you need anything from me ever again All your scars, it was true I was now I won't let you be anything without anyone again In my mind, all these scars remind me of All the scars in my mind that weren't necessary All your self-trust, all your self-hate All that just debacles in the brain You dug my grave before I knew I was dying there with you In my mind, all these scars do In my mind, build upon me this armor So you can't break me again Can't break me again Scars in my mind remind me how you took me Abused me, used me, mistreated Oh, well, that was me I will never get it back again I'll never get it back again Scars are left in my mind, yeah I'll never get it back again All the scars that you did left my heart obliterated Obliterated Scars you left in my mind I will never, ever, ever get past The scars you left in my mind You turned my past to glass I can see you in the night, yeah The past I can see you're not alright With what you've been With what you've been And I think your choice is fair That's why I said Love a bitch Don't fuck a bitch You know what I mean? Anyway
